headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -93.0)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 2% over 7 days (weak momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 143 quotes, heavily skewed toward strong intensity (111 strong vs 32 moderate/mild) - people are expressing serious anger today.

• At 68.4, frustrations remain in the upper portion of the 84-day range, staying consistently elevated from yesterday's 71.8.

• Both fears and optimism are deeply negative, with optimism hitting near its lowest point in nearly 3 months.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
